positive: Stylized panoramic silhouette of ethereal mountains and flowing cosmic nebulae, integrated with bioluminescent flora. The composition must be centered and symmetrical, using a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, vibrant electric cyan, and glowing gold accents. The aesthetic must emulate clean, geometric vector art suitable for screen printing or high-quality apparel prints. Include constellations forming recognizable celestial patterns around the mountain peaks. Highly detailed, minimalist design, perfect symmetry, high contrast, clean line work, vaporwave style, mystical, art deco influence.
